# Korax Systems

Korax Systems builds bespoke desktop automation tools and workflow automation software for UK small businesses. Projects are fixed-price with no lock-in — software is owned outright and built to last.

## Services

- **Desktop Automation Tools** — Custom Windows applications that replace manual, repetitive tasks, from data entry automation to file processing pipelines.
- **Workflow & Task Automation** — Connect existing systems, eliminate copy-paste work, and automate scheduling, reporting, and notifications.
- **Ongoing Support & Maintenance** — Continued support, updates, and improvements as business processes evolve.

## Target market

UK small businesses.
